response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Developer with over 12 years in the field, exceeding the 6+ years requirement. His expertise spans multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, Python, D, C++), frameworks (Node.js, React, Nest.js, Ember.js), and cloud/DevOps tools (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes). His recent work includes AI-agent infrastructure, scalable systems handling millions of requests, and contributions to open-source projects. While he has some gaps in Nest.js and Vitest, his adaptability and breadth of experience strongly compensate.
strengths: 12+ years of fullstack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms
Proven track record in building scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency microservices, AI-agent infrastructure)
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement) and Vitest (testing framework)
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or MySQL in recent roles (relational database requirement)
Primary frontend focus appears to be Ember.js rather than React (though he has React experience)

key_factors.factor: Direct match with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
